headline: Carnival (CCL) Stock Could Be 20.7% Undervalued After Strait Of Hormuz Reopened
summary: The reopening of the Strait of Hormuz has put fuel costs back in focus for travel stocks, and Carnival (CCL) is one of the companies investors are watching as expectations around earnings and onboard spending trends reset. See our latest analysis for Carnival. Carnival’s recent 7 day share price return of 15.08% and 30 day return of 20.07% sit against a year to date decline of 3.27%, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 28.05% and 3 year total shareholder return of about 90% point to...
